psalm-67-1.verse: God be gracious to us and bless us, And cause His face to shine upon us— Selah.
psalm-67-1.prayer: Lord, be gracious to me and bless me. Let Your face shine upon my life so that I may walk in Your favor, peace, and presence.

psalm-67-2.verse: That Your way may be known on the earth, Your salvation among all nations.
psalm-67-2.prayer: Father, make Your way known through my life. Help me reflect Your salvation, goodness, and truth to the people around me.

psalm-67-3.verse: Let the peoples praise You, O God; Let all the peoples praise You.
psalm-67-3.prayer: Lord, may all people praise You. Let my heart join in worship and gratitude for who You are and all You have done.

psalm-67-4.verse: Let the nations be glad and sing for joy; For You will judge the peoples with uprightness And guide the nations on the earth. Selah.
psalm-67-4.prayer: Father, let the nations rejoice because You judge with fairness and guide the people of the earth. Help me trust Your righteous rule.

psalm-67-5.verse: Let the peoples praise You, O God; Let all the peoples praise You.
psalm-67-5.prayer: Lord, may every people and every nation praise You. Let my life continually honor Your name with worship and thanksgiving.

psalm-67-6.verse: The earth has yielded its produce; God, our God, blesses us.
psalm-67-6.prayer: Father, thank You for Your provision and blessing. Help me recognize every good gift as coming from Your hand.

psalm-67-7.verse: God blesses us, That all the ends of the earth may fear Him.
psalm-67-7.prayer: Lord, bless us so that all the ends of the earth may fear and honor You. Use my life to point others toward Your greatness and grace.

psalm-67-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for Your grace, blessing, and salvation. Let Your face shine upon my life and make Your ways known through me. Help me worship You with gratitude, trust Your righteous rule, and reflect Your goodness to others. May my life point people toward Your love, Your truth, and Your glory.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-67-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your grace, blessing, and salvation. Let Your face shine upon my life and make Your ways known through me. Help me worship You with gratitude, trust Your righteous rule, and reflect Your goodness to others. May my life point people toward Your love, Your truth, and Your glory.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
